ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or UT */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active COVID-19 cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases cured/discharged/migrated */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to COVID-19 */,
  "total_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the district is a part of */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active COVID-19 cases in the district */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases cured/discharged/migrated in the district */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to COVID-19 in the district */,
  "total_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total confirmed COVID-19 cases in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the report is made */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on that day */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on that day */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on that day */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of people tested who were found positive */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the health official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., coordinator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the official's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_officials_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the center (daily vaccinations) */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "timing" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center where doses were administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccinations were administered */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered on that date */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the people vaccinated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the people vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Content of the alert message */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the hospital is located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "current_patients" INTEGER /* Current number of patients admitted with COVID-19 */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators available */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state associated with the trend */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "case_trend" REAL /* Trend of new cases over the previous week */,
  "recovery_trend" REAL /* Trend of recoveries over the previous week */,
  "death_trend" REAL /* Trend of deaths over the previous week */,
  "test_positivity_rate_trend" REAL /* Trend of test positivity rate over the previous week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
